text.title: Fork vs Fix — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for a `FixDecision` record per bug-blocking-upstream-library event.

example.code: { "decision_id": "9b6c0a4e-3a44-4f3a-8a9d-1f0e1234ffff", "library": {"name": "n8n", "ecosystem": "npm", "current_version": "1.42.0", "bug_summary": "custom node loader does not support python-via-child_process", "repro_link": "https://github.com/faionfaion/n8n/issues/1"}, "axes": [ {"name": "urgency", "score": 2, "evidence": "days, not hours"}, {"name": "blast", "score": 3, "evidence": "blocks entire product line"}, {"name": "patch_size", "score": 2, "evidence": "~40 LOC across 3 files"}, {"name": "upstream_responsiveness", "score": 2, "evidence": "median merge: 3 weeks; mixed"}, {"name": "strategic_dependency", "score": 3, "evidence": "n8n core forever for the automation product"} ], "total_score": 12, "action": "fork_pin", "action_playbook_url": "decisions/2026-05-23-n8n-fork.md", "strategic_override_applied": true, "ban_list_blocked": false, "sunset_criterion": "when our upstream PR merges OR by 2027-Q1", "rollback_plan": "drop the fork pin in package.json; revert to public n8n with workaround for python loader", "decided_by": "ruslan@faion.net", "decided_at": "2026-05-23T14:00:00Z" }

example.note: decision_id not UUID; only 1 axis; axis score out of range; security lib monkey-patched (ban-list violation); empty rollback plan.

antipattern.description: `action: monkey_patch` AND library on security-critical / framework-core ban list.
`action` does not match band per r2 (e.g., total_score=12 with action=monkey_patch).
antipattern.reason: Decision must follow the rule; deviations require an explicit override field with justification.
